{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "in-service",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant", "failed"],
  "percent_complete": 0,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.98,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "No attendant posted outside the confined space during entry operations, violating OSHA 1910.146 permit-required confined space attendant requirements",
    "Critical safety control failure: the attendant role is a mandatory element of the permit-required confined space entry program and its absence eliminates a primary life-safety function",
    "Entry operations are non-compliant and must be halted immediately until a qualified attendant is stationed outside the space"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately suspend all confined space entry operations",
    "Post a qualified attendant outside the confined space before any further entry",
    "Verify the attendant has completed required training and understands their duties under OSHA 1910.146",
    "Review the confined space permit to confirm attendant assignment and contact rescue services",
    "Conduct a safety stand-down to reinforce permit-required confined space entry procedures"
  ],
  "rationale": "Under OSHA 1910.146, a permit-required confined space entry requires an attendant stationed outside the space to monitor entrants, maintain communication, perform non-entry rescue, and summon emergency services. The observed condition of no attendant posted constitutes a direct failure of this mandatory safety control. This is a critical life-safety failure because the attendant is the primary means of detecting hazards, initiating rescue, and preventing unauthorized entry. The entry is non-compliant and must be stopped immediately.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.146 - Permit-Required Confined Spaces",
    "OSHA 1910.146(d) - Permit space program requirements",
    "OSHA 1910.146(i) - Duties of attendants"
  ]
}
